anno_projectManager: Open the Project Manager, where you can add or remove Projects.
anno_saveWorkshop: Save a WIP file for the current Asset/Shot/Component.
anno_master: Save a master file for the current Asset/Shot/Component.
anno_revive: Revive an old version of the current Asset/Shot/Component.
anno_removeAssetType: Remove the selected Asset Type(s) from the inventory.
anno_removeAsset: Remove the selected Asset from the inventory.
anno_viewAsset: Open the master file for the Asset.
anno_importAssetWorkshop: Import the Asset's latest WIP file into the current scene.
anno_importAssetMaster: Import the Asset's master file into the current scene.
anno_referenceAssetWorkshop: Reference the Asset's latest WIP file into the current scene.
anno_referenceAssetMaster: Reference the Asset's master file into the current scene.
anno_assetList: Double-click to edit Asset. Hold right mouse button for more options.
anno_viewComponent: Open the master file for the Component.
anno_importComponentWorkshop: Import the Component's latest WIP file into the current scene.
anno_importComponentMaster: Import the Component's master file into the current scene.
anno_referenceComponentWorkshop: Reference the Component's latest WIP file into the current scene.
anno_referenceComponentMaster: Reference the Component's master file into the current scene.
anno_componentList: Double-click to edit Component. Hold down right mouse button for more options.
anno_newComponent: Create a new Component for the selected Asset.
anno_removeComponent: Remove the selected Component from the inventory.
anno_removeSequence: Remove the selected Sequence from the inventory.
anno_viewShot: Open the master file for the Shot.
anno_importShotWorkshop: Import the Shot's latest WIP file into the current scene.
anno_importShotMaster: Import the Shot's master file into the current scene.
anno_referenceShotWorkshop: Reference the Shot's latest WIP file into the current scene.
anno_referenceShotMaster: Reference the Shot's master file into the current scene.
anno_shotList: Double-click to Edit Shot. Hold down right mouse button for more options.
anno_viewShotComponent: Open the master file for the Component.
anno_importShotComponentWorkshop: Import the Component's latest WIP file into the current scene.
anno_importShotComponentMaster: Import the Component's master file into the current scene.
anno_referenceShotComponentWorkshop: Reference the Component's latest WIP file into the current scene.
anno_referenceShotComponentMaster: Reference the Component's master file into the current scene.
anno_shotComponentList: Double-click to edit Component. Hold down right mouse button for more options.
anno_newShotComponent: Create a new Component for the selected Asset.
anno_removeShotComponent: Remove the selected Component from the inventory.
